import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_object(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # State info
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_object(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_cnt_s = find_object(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state info
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_object(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_cnt_n = find_object(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # ===== SUCCESS =====
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    success_reward = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    # ===== PHASE 1: approach pyramid =====
    d_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    d_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    phase1 = (1.0 - hs) * (1.0 - hn)
    r_approach_pyr = phase1 * (d_agent_pyr_s - d_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 5.0
    # Absolute closeness bonus when not holding
    r_close_pyr = (1.0 - hn) * (max_dist - d_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 0.5

    # ===== PICKUP =====
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # ===== PHASE 2: holding pyramid, approach square =====
    d_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    d_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)
    phase2 = hs * hn
    r_approach_sq = phase2 * (d_agent_sq_s - d_agent_sq_n) / max_dist * 5.0
    # Absolute closeness bonus when holding
    r_close_sq = hn * (max_dist - d_agent_sq_n) / max_dist * 0.5

    # ===== PUTDOWN =====
    # Big bonus if placed adjacent, penalty if placed far
    placed_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_near = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.5)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.5)
    r_putdown = (
        placed_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 15.0
        + placed_near.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)
    )

    # ===== PYRAMID-SQUARE PROXIMITY (already placed) =====
    # When pyramid is on grid and not held, dense reward for pyr-sq distance
    both_placed = (~holding_s) & (~holding_n) & pyr_on_grid_s & pyr_on_grid_n
    r_pyr_sq_improve = both_placed.astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_pyr_sq_s - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist * 3.0
    # Also absolute proximity bonus when placed
    r_pyr_sq_close = both_placed.astype(jnp.float32) * (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist * 1.0

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_close_pyr * 0.0  # skip to avoid reward hacking
        + r_pickup
        + r_approach_sq
        + r_close_sq * 0.0  # skip to avoid reward hacking
        + r_putdown
        + r_pyr_sq_improve
        + r_pyr_sq_close
        + success_reward
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
